registry.description: Disable Turbopack and restore stable dashboard rendering on port 3000.
Implement watchdog in playwright-server.js to recover from 'target closed' errors.
Use vault_rag_server.py (port 8091) to generate daily strategic intel briefs.
Modularize the 7000+ line discovery report for better agent parsing.
Refactor the main hub component into smaller, functional sectors.
Periodic check of agent responsiveness via Neural Relay.
Establish telemetry path from mobile devices to central vault.
